# ⚠️ DEPRECATED — Use `x-ipe-tool-task-board-manager` Instead

This skill has been replaced by **`x-ipe-tool-task-board-manager`** which uses JSON-based storage.

**New skill location:** `.github/skills/x-ipe-tool-task-board-manager/SKILL.md`

All task operations (create, update, query, archive) are now handled by Python scripts in `.github/skills/x-ipe-tool-task-board-manager/scripts/`.
